“掌控命运...真相显现....”
“一切皆按照我所想！！”
“我在死亡中绽放，重生于真相！”
“因果循环.....自有定数.....”
“但无妨，我即将在死亡中绽放，重生于真实！”
【我叫杨枫，枫叶的枫，不是疯子的疯！】
这么好看的小说我怎么才找到啊啊啊啊！！
千万不要断更啊 @负辜 [害羞][害羞][害羞][吃瓜][吃瓜][送心]","text_exts":[{"e":157,"s":153,"text":"","tp":2,"uri":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NykmSmC+oGwBMlQDyWERaAZDLDHJN834RS/uMRUScovu"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1718005327,"group_id":"7368407407099137086","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"“我向神明许下诺言 我爱戏神亿万年”","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7obhCa4SeqJtZriaGDnRGoHZ3FyoGxpIf08bfSRy79b","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/21868f2a0dee4ca6861ffdba9a790e61~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776709654&x-signature=W5liuj2K4NHHMDQmZ6l%2BazyOymg%3D","user_id":"3932321787419000","user_name":"迟椿忆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3932321787419000","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7368407407099137086","book_info":{"abstract":"（不后宫，无女主，不套路，不系统，不无脑，反转，慢热，序列，团队群像，热血，优雅的高智商疯批）
